div.h1: Working Set Tracker: Sliding Window Analysis

ol.li: Record: Every memory access triggers record(vpn).
Insert: Store VPN in circular buffer at head.
Evaluate: On interval, count unique VPNs in buffer.

div.p: Thrashing occurs when physical memory is smaller than the detected Working Set. The OS spends >90% of cycles on Page Fault I/O rather than process execution.
Distinct VPNs: {1, 2, 3} Working Set Size (WSS): 3 pages
